seo.title: GBG Auto Repair & Inspection | Trusted Mechanic in Dallas, TX
seo.description: GBG Auto Repair & Inspection in Dallas, TX offers expert auto repair, diagnostics, and inspections. Certified mechanics, honest service. Call (214) 370-0375.

hero.headline: Reliable Auto Repair & Inspections in Dallas
hero.subheadline: From routine maintenance to major repairs, our certified mechanics deliver quality service you can count on.

featureSections.title: Comprehensive Auto Repair & Diagnostics
featureSections.body: Our ASE-certified technicians use the latest diagnostic tools to quickly identify and fix issues. We handle everything from brake repairs to engine diagnostics, ensuring your vehicle runs smoothly.
featureSections.cardBody: We provide upfront estimates and explain every repair, so you never feel in the dark.

featureSections.title: State Inspections & Routine Maintenance
featureSections.body: Keep your car safe and legal with our thorough state inspections and preventive maintenance services. We make it easy to stay on schedule.
bullets: Oil changes, tire rotations, fluid checks
featureSections.cardBody: Most inspections and maintenance services are completed within an hour.

whyChooseUs.title: Certified Technicians
whyChooseUs.description: Our team holds ASE certifications and undergoes continuous training to stay current with automotive technology.

whyChooseUs.title: Customer-First Approach
whyChooseUs.description: We treat every customer like family, offering clear communication and no-pressure recommendations.

whyChooseUs.title: Quality Parts & Warranty
whyChooseUs.description: We use OEM-quality parts and back our work with a comprehensive warranty for your peace of mind.

whyChooseUs.title: Convenient Location & Hours
whyChooseUs.description: Located in Dallas with extended hours to fit your busy schedule. Early drop-offs available.

testimonials.quote: I've been bringing my car here for years. They always explain what's needed and the prices are fair. Highly recommend!

testimonials.quote: Fast, honest, and professional. They got my inspection done in 20 minutes. Will definitely be back.

testimonials.author: David R.

cta.headline: Ready for Reliable Auto Care?
cta.subheadline: Schedule your appointment today and experience the GBG difference.

servicesPage.intro: From routine inspections to complex repairs, GBG Auto Repair & Inspection offers a full range of automotive services in Dallas, TX. Our certified technicians use advanced tools and quality parts to keep your vehicle running at its best.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert engine diagnostics and repair to restore performance and reliability.
services.longDescription: Our technicians use state-of-the-art diagnostic equipment to pinpoint engine issues quickly. Whether it's a check engine light, loss of power, or unusual noises, we provide accurate repairs using quality parts. We service all makes and models.
benefits: Accurate diagnostics save time and money
Restored engine performance and fuel efficiency

process.title: Comprehensive Scan
process.description: We connect your vehicle to our diagnostic system to retrieve error codes and data.

process.title: In-Depth Analysis
process.description: Our technician interprets the data and performs physical inspections to confirm the issue.

process.title: Repair & Verification
process.description: We complete the repair using quality parts and test drive to ensure everything is working perfectly.

faqs.question: How long does an engine diagnostic take?
faqs.answer: Most diagnostics take about an hour. Complex issues may require additional time.

faqs.question: Do you service foreign and domestic cars?
faqs.answer: Yes, we work on all makes and models, including European, Asian, and domestic vehicles.

services.title: Brake Services
services.shortDescription: Complete brake inspection, repair, and replacement for safety and performance.
services.longDescription: Your brakes are critical for safety. We inspect pads, rotors, calipers, and fluid levels to ensure optimal stopping power. Our brake services include pad replacement, rotor resurfacing, and brake fluid flushes.

process.title: Thorough Inspection
process.description: We check all brake components and measure pad thickness and rotor condition.

process.title: Expert Recommendations
process.description: We explain what needs repair and provide a no-obligation estimate.

process.title: Quality Installation
process.description: We install premium brake parts and test the system for proper function.

faqs.question: How often should I replace my brake pads?
faqs.answer: Typically every 30,000-70,000 miles, but it depends on driving habits. We inspect them at every visit.

faqs.question: What are signs of brake trouble?
faqs.answer: Squealing, grinding, a soft pedal, or vibration when braking are common signs.

services.title: State Inspections
services.shortDescription: Quick and thorough Texas state vehicle inspections to keep you legal.
services.longDescription: We perform official Texas state inspections for all passenger vehicles. Our inspectors check safety items like lights, brakes, tires, and emissions (where required). We aim for fast turnaround so you can get back on the road.

process.title: Vehicle Check-In
process.description: Bring your vehicle and registration. We'll start the inspection right away.

process.title: Safety & Emissions Test
process.description: We test all required components including lights, brakes, horn, and emissions system.

process.title: Sticker Issuance
process.description: If your vehicle passes, we provide the inspection sticker and update the state database.

faqs.question: How long does a state inspection take?
What if my car fails?
faqs.answer: We'll provide a detailed report of what needs repair. You can choose to have us fix it or take it elsewhere.

services.title: AC & Heating Repair
services.shortDescription: Keep your cabin comfortable with expert AC and heating system services.
services.longDescription: A malfunctioning AC or heater can make driving miserable. We diagnose and repair all climate control issues, from refrigerant leaks to compressor failures. We also perform regular AC maintenance to keep your system efficient.

process.title: System Diagnosis
process.description: We check refrigerant levels, compressor function, and electrical components.

process.title: Repair & Replacement
process.description: We fix leaks, replace faulty parts, and recharge refrigerant as needed.

process.title: Performance Test
process.description: We run the system to ensure proper cooling and heating before you leave.

faqs.question: Why is my AC blowing warm air?
faqs.answer: Common causes include low refrigerant, a faulty compressor, or an electrical issue. We can diagnose the exact cause.

faqs.question: How often should I service my AC?
faqs.answer: We recommend an AC check every two years to catch issues early and maintain performance.

about.headline: Your Trusted Dallas Auto Repair Shop
about.mission: At GBG Auto Repair & Inspection, our mission is to provide honest, high-quality automotive service that keeps our community safe and moving. We believe in transparency, integrity, and customer satisfaction above all.
story: GBG Auto Repair & Inspection was founded with a simple philosophy: treat every customer like family and every car like it's our own. With over two decades of experience in the Dallas automotive industry, our founder saw a need for a shop that combined technical expertise with old-fashioned honesty. We started small, but our commitment to quality quickly earned us a loyal following.

Today, we continue to serve the Dallas community with a team of ASE-certified technicians and state-of-the-art equipment. Whether it's a routine oil change or a complex engine repair, we approach every job with the same dedication to excellence. We're proud to be a trusted name in Dallas auto care.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We always provide honest recommendations and transparent pricing.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-tier parts and follow best practices for every repair.

coreValues.title: Customer Focus
coreValues.description: Your satisfaction and safety drive every decision we make.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We're proud to serve our neighbors and give back to Dallas.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with GBG Auto Repair
contact.subheadline: Ready to schedule service or have questions? Contact us today.
